title: Frontend Remediation — FULL page-by-page QA
notes: Granular, page-by-page acceptance pass for the frontend remediation. The refactor was behavior-preserving code MOVEMENT, except the 5 error-contract items (group 'Error handling (T4)') which deliberately change the failure path. For most items you're confirming: the page still loads (no blank screen / no red console error) and its key actions work. For the T4 items you're also confirming a FAILURE shows a message instead of crashing (use DevTools → Network → Offline to force it). Routes are relative to the app origin. Effects/emails/data writes are fine to trigger (owner has those covered). Code gates already pass: tsc -b 0, production build 0, harness 6/6, 0 files >800.

items.title: Agent Insights — load + approve/reject + failure
items.precondition: Admin; an org with agent outputs.
steps: 1. Open the page; confirm insights load.
2. Approve one insight → success toast + row updates.
3. Reject one insight (confirm dialog) → success toast + row updates.
4. FAILURE: DevTools Network = Offline, trigger a reload/approve → an error message shows; no crash/blank.
items.expected: Success actions work; a failed call shows an error, not a crash.

items.title: Clarity metrics — load + failure
items.precondition: Location that has Microsoft Clarity data.
steps: 1. Open the surface showing Clarity sessions/bounce/dead-clicks/trend; confirm it renders.
2. FAILURE: Offline, reselect the location to refetch → a Clarity error message shows; no crash.
items.expected: Clarity renders on success; failure shows the error text.

items.title: Connect Google button — popup + failure
items.precondition: A surface with the Google connect button.
steps: 1. Click Connect Google → OAuth popup opens (cancel it; do NOT complete a real publish).
2. FAILURE: Offline, click connect → 'Failed to start Google connection' shows and the button is NOT stuck loading.
items.expected: Popup opens; on failure an error shows and the button resets.

items.title: GBP data / accounts / locations — load + failure
steps: 1. Confirm GBP reviews/rating/calls render and the account/location pickers populate.
2. FAILURE: Offline, refetch → error text for data, accounts, and locations; no crash.
items.expected: GBP data + lists render on success; failures show errors.

items.title: Onboarding + app startup — HIGHEST RISK
items.precondition: Test with BOTH an onboarded user AND a brand-new user.
steps: 1. Onboarded user: log in → you land IN the app (not onboarding).
2. New user: onboarding flow shows; do save-profile, select GBP, complete → each works.
3. Product tour wizard: start / skip / complete / restart.
4. CRITICAL: as an ONBOARDED user, set Network = Offline and hard-reload once → confirm you are NOT dropped into onboarding (the no-downgrade guard). Back online + reload → normal.
items.expected: Onboarded users stay in-app even if the startup status call fails; new users see onboarding; wizard + saves work.
items.notes: The single change that touches app-load. Test the offline-reload-as-onboarded-user case.

items.title: Dashboard / Practice Hub
steps: 1. Load — production panel, one-thing banner, stat cards render.
2. Click into any stat/source link.
items.expected: Dashboard renders and links work.

items.title: Local Rankings dashboard (RankingsDashboard 1968→620)
steps: 1. Load — rank, health gauge, factor breakdown, search-position, gaps, next-moves all render.
2. Expand/interact with any panel; map renders if present.
items.expected: Every ranking panel renders identically.

items.title: Referrals / PMS hub (PMSVisualPillars 1512→619, PMSDataViewer, PMSLatestJobEditor)
steps: 1. Load — PMS visual pillars render (data + automation status).
2. Open the data viewer / latest-job editor if surfaced.
3. Open the Manual Entry modal → see CL-7.
items.expected: PMS hub renders; automation status + data show as before.

items.title: Referral Engine dashboard (ReferralEngineDashboard 981→786)
steps: 1. Load — metric cards, table, loading/error states render.
items.expected: Referral dashboard renders all panels.

items.title: Reviews & Posts (GBP manager)
steps: 1. Load — pill tabs, stat boxes, pre-gen drafts render.
2. Switch tabs.
items.expected: Reviews & Posts renders and tabs switch.

items.title: DFY Website editor (DFYWebsite 1869→535 + useDfyWebsite core)
steps: 1. Load — toolbar, iframe, sidebar render; check preparing/read-only/empty states.
2. Select an element, edit its text, SAVE → confirm it persists.
3. Switch dashboard/website tabs; open connect-domain.
items.expected: Editor loads; select + text-edit + save + tab switching all work (the whole editor state core was moved into a hook).

items.title: PMS Manual Entry modal (PMSManualEntryModal 2208→482 + use* hooks)
steps: 1. Open Manual Entry.
2. Paste tabular data → preview parses; OR upload a file.
3. Switch month tabs; edit a source row; resolve a month-mismatch banner if shown.
4. Submit → confirm it saves.
items.expected: Paste/upload → preview → row edit → submit all behave as before (the 24-state core was lifted into hooks).

items.title: Competitor onboarding (LocationCompetitorOnboarding 1746→599)

steps: 1. Discovering stage renders.
2. Curating stage: the Leaflet map shows pins + radius control; adjust radius.
3. Open refresh-suggestions modal; add/remove a competitor; finalize.
items.expected: Map, radius control, curation, and finalize all work as before.

items.title: Tasks view (TasksView 880→624)

items.title: Settings tabs (account / billing / integrations / locations / users)

2. Integrations tab: confirm GBP / Clarity / Google connect controls render (the T4-3 / T4-4 connect lives here).
items.expected: All settings tabs render; integration controls present.

items.title: Websites list (WebsitesList 870→774)
steps: 1. Load — rows, status pills, relative times render.
2. Use filters / list-view tabs; open a website.

3. Open each modal: Identity, Layout inputs, Create page, Find/replace, Connect domain.
4. Visit a bad id → loading/error/not-found states.
items.expected: Header, every tab, and every modal render and work.

items.expected: Posts list + editor + SEO panel render; save works.

items.title: Post Blocks tab (PostBlocksTab 991→798)

items.title: Page Editor (PageEditor 2127→279 + use* hooks)

4. Open each modal; check loading/error/version-preview banners.
items.expected: Editor loads; edit/save/undo/redo/version-restore + modals all work (whole state core lifted into hooks).

items.title: PMS Automation Cards (PMSAutomationCards 1154→489 + usePmsAutomationJobs)

2. Use status/approval filters; pagination.

items.expected: Automation cards, filters, approval toggle, and response editor work (state core moved to a hook).

items.title: Identity modal (IdentityModal 3422→781 + 5 child views)
steps: 1. Open the Identity modal.
2. Cycle every view: empty/warm-up form, warming-up, ready view, identity LIST tab, LOCATIONS tab.
3. Edit a field; add/remove a location; toggle the JSON editor; save.
items.expected: Every identity view/tab renders and saves (the 3,400-line modal was split into 5 child views).

items.title: Import-from-Identity modal (ImportFromIdentityModal 821→759)

items.expected: Import flow + progress render and complete as before.

items.title: Shared UI primitives (DesignSystem 1096→16 barrel)
steps: 1. On 3-4 admin pages, confirm shared widgets render: metric cards, status pills, page headers, filter bar, tab bar, empty states, badges.
items.expected: All shared DesignSystem components render everywhere (split into a barrel of 6 files).

items.title: Folder reorganization (T5) — no broken admin route
steps: 1. Click through the main admin nav items; confirm no page is blank or 404 and no red console error.
2. Watch the browser console for missing-module / failed-import errors.
items.expected: Every admin route loads — the 87-file Admin folder reorg + the API/DesignSystem barrel splits broke nothing.

items.title: API client splits (websites/minds/pms barrels)
steps: 1. Any website-builder, minds, or PMS data loads correctly (these api files were each split into submodules behind a re-export barrel — all 376 exports preserved).
items.expected: All data-loading on those pages works; no import/resolution errors.
